\tzpentry{ID3842}{Greens Function Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3842 introduces Greens Function Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\mu_r\), the Green’s function is \[ G(r,r') = \frac{1}{4\pi |r-r'|} + \sum_{\ell=0}^{\infty} \sum_{m=-\ell}^{\ell} A_{\ell m}(\mu_r) Y_{\ell m}(\theta,\varphi)\,\overline{Y_{\ell m}(\theta',\varphi')} \frac{(\min(r,r')/\max(r,r'))^{\ell}}{\max(r,r')}. \] The coefficient \(A_{\ell m}(\mu_r)\)
\]
